items.title: Silver Palace unveils newest gameplay PV focusing on female protagonist
items.summary: Silver Palace is one of the more interesting open-world ARPGs set to arrive on mobile. Set in the Belle Epoch-style city of Silvernia, it boasts some fantastic environments and character designs that really stand out from the more typical fantasy and futuristic aesthetic we see in the genre. And you can get an even better sense of that in Silver Palace's newest PV! In case you missed it, last week, Silver Palace began recruiting for its latest closed beta test, nicknamed Dichotomy. To mark the beginning of the recruitment period, we got a look at some gameplay featuring the male protagonist, and now Silver Palace is switching focus to the female main character for this new PV. ... [ MORE ]

review.notes: Confirm platform, release state, and target regions before publishing.

items.title: 「モンスターハンターアウトランダーズ」，第3回クローズドβテストを2026年8月7日に開始。参加申し込みを受付中
items.summary: TiMiStudioGroupは，スマホアプリ「モンスターハンターアウトランダーズ」の第3回クローズドβテストを2026年8月7日11：00より実施すると発表した。対象プラットフォームはiOSとAndroid。参加者の募集もスタートしている。

items.summary: 新作タイトル「アズールプロミリア」のAndroidとPCを対象としたクローズドβテストが2026年7月2日12：00にスタート。Twitchの配信では，もちろんコメントを通じて，自由に質問していただいても構いません。

items.title: Grand Outlaws looks to offer stylish GTA-like open-world action on mobile as it announces launch date
items.summary: With GTA VI right around the corner, there's a lot of hubbub about whether it'll live up to the hype surrounding it, that price tag, and indeed which games are going to get out of the way before it hits shelves. But there are plenty of others looking to offer an alternative take on the digital criminal lifestyle, like Grand Outlaws. Set to arrive on iOS and Android in late summer, Grand Outlaws bills itself as an immersive sim offering the same mixture of fast-paced action and roleplaying that GTA pioneered and many others have sought to emulate. However, Grand Outlaws certainly reminds me more of Saints Row than Grand Theft Auto. ... [ MORE ]

items.title: スマホ版「幻想水滸伝 STAR LEAP」，事前登録受付をApp StoreとGoogle Playで開始。これまでのシリーズと同じ世界を舞台にしたRPG
items.summary: KONAMIは本日，スマホ版「幻想水滸伝STARLEAP」の事前登録受付を，AppStoreとGooglePlayで開始した。本作は，「幻想水滸伝」シリーズで初めてスマホ向けに配信されるタイトルで，これまでのシリーズと同じ世界を舞台にしたRPGだ。

review.notes: Confirm platform, release state, and target regions before publishing.
